◎简　　介  

　　"Hightown" is set on iconic Cape Cod, and it follows one woman's journey to sobriety, intertwined with an unfolding murder investigation. Jackie Quiñones, a hard-partying National Marine Fisheries Service agent, has her free-wheelingwww.2kyb.comlife thrown into disarray when she discovers a body on the beach - another casualty of Cape Cod's opioid epidemic.
